confirmClose.title: Confirm Close
confirmClose.content: After closing, the filled content will be saved. You can restore it next time you open it. Do you confirm that it has been closed?

restoreData.content: The system detected that you have an unfinished publish record. Do you want to restore it?

buttons.schedulePublishDesc: Choose a specific time to post.

tips.xhsOffline: Xiaohongshu account is offline, please download the App to operate

form.title: Title
form.sourcePlaceholder: Please specify source, time, location (e.g. from https://www.xxxx.com/yyyy)

validation.facebookStoryNoDes: Facebook Story does not support description
validation.facebookReelNoImage: Facebook Reel does not support image upload
validation.instagramStoryNoDes: Instagram Story does not support description
validation.instagramReelNoImage: Instagram Reel does not support image upload
validation.instagramPostNoVideo: Instagram post does not support video upload
validation.dragImageUnsupported: {{platformNames}} does not support image posts. Please switch to a supported platform before applying this content.
validation.dragVideoUnsupported: {{platformNames}} does not support video posts. Please switch to a supported platform before applying this content.
validation.dragImagePartiallyUnsupported: This image content was applied only to supported platforms. Unsupported: {{platformNames}}
validation.dragVideoPartiallyUnsupported: This video content was applied only to supported platforms. Unsupported: {{platformNames}}
validation.topicUnsupported: {{platformName}} does not support topics. Please remove topics before publishing
validation.topicFormatError: Topics in description must be separated by spaces, such as: "#topic1 #topic2"
validation.sourceRequired: Source must be filled when reprinting!
validation.imageOnly: Images already exist, you can only upload more images, not videos!
validation.videoOnly: Videos already exist, you can only upload more videos, not images!
validation.imageVideoMixed: Images and videos cannot be uploaded together!
validation.onlyImageOrVideo: Only image or video files can be uploaded!
validation.videoMaxExceeded: The number of videos uploaded cannot exceed {{maxCount}}
validation.instagramImageValidation: Instagram Post image aspect ratio must be between 4:5 and 1.91:1.
validation.instagramReelAspectRatio: Instagram Reel video aspect ratio must be between 4:5 and 9:16.
validation.facebookReelDuration: Facebook Reel video duration must be 3–90 seconds
validation.facebookStoryDuration: Facebook Story video duration must be 3–60 seconds
validation.instagramReelDuration: Instagram Reel video duration must be 3 seconds–15 minutes
validation.instagramStoryDuration: Instagram Story video duration must be 3–60 seconds
validation.threadsVideoDuration: Threads video duration must be greater than 0 and no more than 5 minutes
validation.threadsImageMin: Threads requires at least two images
validation.pinterestVideoDuration: Pinterest video duration must be 4 seconds–15 minutes
validation.tiktokVideoDuration: TikTok video duration must be 3 seconds to 10 minutes
validation.tiktokImageFormat: TikTok image format only supports JPEG, JPG, and WEBP
validation.twitterVideoDuration: Twitter video duration must be 0.5–140 seconds
validation.facebookPostImageSize: Facebook Post image size cannot exceed 4MB
validation.facebookStoryImageSize: Facebook Story image size cannot exceed 4MB
validation.tiktokVideoResolution: TikTok video max resolution is 1080x1920 or 1920x1080
validation.tiktokPrivacyLevelRequired: Please select the privacy level for TikTok video
validation.tiktokContentDisclosureRequired: Please select your content disclosure type: promoting your own brand or promoting a third party
validation.twitterPollNoMedia: Polls cannot include images or videos
validation.twitterTaggedUsersLimit: Twitter image posts can tag up to 10 users
validation.twitterAltTextMax: Twitter media alt text cannot exceed 1000 characters
validation.youtubeVideoDuration: YouTube video duration cannot exceed 12 hours
validation.xhsImageSize: RedNote image size cannot exceed 20MB per image
validation.xhsVideoDuration: RedNote video duration cannot exceed 4 hours
validation.bilibiliVideoDuration: Bilibili video duration cannot exceed 10 hours
validation.douyinVideoDuration: Douyin video duration cannot exceed 15 minutes
validation.kwaiVideoDuration: Kwai video duration cannot exceed 1 hour
validation.facebookPostVideoDuration: Facebook Post video duration cannot exceed 4 hours
validation.facebookStoryVideoSize: Facebook Story video size cannot exceed 1000MB
validation.instagramReelVideoSize: Instagram Reel video size cannot exceed 300MB
validation.instagramStoryVideoSize: Instagram Story video size cannot exceed 100MB
validation.linkedinVideoDuration: LinkedIn video duration must be 3 seconds–30 minutes
validation.wxSphVideoSize: WeChat Channels video size cannot exceed 20GB
validation.wxSphVideoDuration: WeChat Channels video duration cannot exceed 8 hours
validation.wxGzhImageSize: WeChat Official Account image size cannot exceed 10MB
validation.topicTotalLengthExceeded: The total topic length cannot exceed {{max}} characters
validation.imageContentUnsupported: {{platformName}} does not support image posts. Please remove images before publishing
validation.videoContentUnsupported: {{platformName}} does not support video posts. Please remove the video before publishing
validation.textContentUnsupported: {{platformName}} does not support text-only posts. Please upload an image or video
validation.imageFormatUnsupported: Image format is not supported. Supported formats: {{formats}}
validation.videoFormatUnsupported: Video format is not supported. Supported formats: {{formats}}
validation.douyinImageSize: Douyin image size cannot exceed 20MB per image
validation.kwaiImageSize: Kwai image size cannot exceed 20MB per image
validation.facebookStoryMediaMax: Facebook Story can include at most 1 image or video
validation.facebookStoryNoTitle: Facebook Story does not support title
validation.facebookStoryNoLink: Facebook Story does not support link
validation.instagramMentionMax: Instagram description can mention up to 20 users
validation.tiktokImageMin: TikTok photo posts require at least 2 images

messages.contentModerationFailed: Content moderation failed, please try again later
messages.platformNotSupportedDirect: Direct authorization for {{platform}} platform is not supported yet
messages.mobileNotSupported: This feature is not supported on mobile, please use desktop
messages.publishSubmitted: Your post has been submitted. It may take a few minutes for the content to process and appear on your {{platform}} profile.
messages.douyinScanPublish: Douyin publishing requires scanning a QR code with the Douyin app. Please watch for the QR code popup.
messages.wxSphLinkPollingLoginRequired: WeChat Channels login has expired. Please log in again and keep your browser open; the plugin will continue fetching the work link.
messages.userActionFetchFailed: Failed to get the publish entry. Please try again.

commercial.title: Disclose video content
commercial.toggle: Turn on to disclose that this video promotes goods or services in exchange for something of value. Your video
commercial.yourBrand: Your Brand - You are promoting yourself or your own business. This content will be classified as Brand Organic.
commercial.yourBrandDesc: You are promoting yourself or your own business. This content will be labeled as 'Promotional content'.
commercial.brandedContent: Branded Content - You are promoting another brand or a third party. This content will be classified as Branded Content.
commercial.brandedContentDesc: You are promoting another brand or a third party. This content will be labeled as 'Paid partnership'.
commercial.disclosureWarning: You need to indicate whether your content is promoting yourself, a third party, or both.
commercial.brandedContentPrivacyRestriction: Branded content visibility cannot be set to private.

compliance.default: By posting, you agree to TikTok's Music Usage Confirmation.
compliance.organic: By posting, you agree to TikTok's Music Usage Confirmation.
compliance.branded: By posting, you agree to TikTok's Branded Content Policy and Music Usage Confirmation.
compliance.both: By posting, you agree to TikTok's Branded Content Policy and Music Usage Confirmation.
compliance.processNote: Note: After publishing, it may take a few minutes for the content to process and appear on your profile.

record.dragToRescheduleTip: You can also drag the publish record to change its publish time.
record.cancelPublishConfirmContent: After cancellation, this content will not be published as currently scheduled. You can reschedule it later.
record.deleteConfirmContent: This only deletes the local publish record and does not delete the work on the platform. This action cannot be undone.
record.wxSphReviewPendingDesc: The work link updates automatically after WeChat Channels approves the video. Keep your browser open and stay logged in.

douyin.scanInstruction: Content generated, please scan with Douyin APP to publish
douyin.scanStep1: 1. Open Douyin APP, tap scan icon
douyin.scanStep2: 2. Scan the QR code below to jump to publish page
douyin.mobileJumpConfirm: Content generated, jump to Douyin APP to publish?
douyin.mobileLaunchDesc: Content is ready. Tap the button below to open Douyin App and publish
douyin.launchFailed: Failed to open Douyin. Please open the Douyin App manually

twitter.pollMediaWarning: Polls cannot include images or videos. Remove media to add a poll.
twitter.mediaDisabledByPoll: Poll is enabled. Media enhancements apply after removing the poll.
twitter.noMediaOptions: Add images or a video to set media tags and alt text.

sections.pollDesc: Polls cannot be posted with images or videos.
sections.mediaDesc: Tag users on images and add alt text for media.

search.minKeyword: Enter at least 2 characters to search
search.pluginUnavailable: The current plugin version does not support WeChat Channels search. Please update the plugin and try again.

location.title: Location
location.hint: Search WeChat Channels locations by keyword and choose one to submit with the post.

activity.title: Activity
activity.hint: Search WeChat Channels activities by keyword and choose one to join.

extLink.title: Link
extLink.hint: Optional. It will be passed to the WeChat Channels extended reading field when publishing.

original.title: Declare Original
original.hint: After declaration, the post can show an original mark and may be eligible for ad revenue.
